element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn to move and rotate falling colored beans before any challenge
Basic match mechanic taught against weak AI opponents
More challenging opponents demonstrate and require chain strategy
Grey unmatchable beans sent by opponents as penalty for player combos; forces defensive play
Difficulty escalates through opponent roster in Scenario Mode

typical_tension_triggers: Incoming refugee beans from opponent combos
Beans stacking toward top of grid
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tension cycle per match: early calm play, mid-game strategic buildup, late-game defensive pressure against increasingly aggressive AI opponents. Scenario Mode provides structured tension escalation across 13 boss fights.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Weak initial opponents allow learning of basic matching and simple chains without punishment
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Opponents demonstrate chain combos and start sending refugee beans; player must balance offense with defense
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final opponents execute complex chains consistently, flood board with refugee beans, require mastery of combo timing and strategic planning
notable_spikes: Transition from early to mid-game: introduction of refugee bean mechanic changes gameplay from pure matching to strategic interference management
Each opponent tier increase in Scenario Mode represents escalating AI competence
Final opponents require advanced chain execution to overcome their combo pressure

notable_level_patterns.description: 13 consecutive opponent matches with increasing difficulty. Each opponent is a named Sonic character representing escalating challenge levels. Player must win each match to progress; no alternative paths.

As match progresses, refugee beans accumulate and player's own beans stack higher, compressing available play space. This creates natural difficulty escalation within individual matches independent of opponent AI.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Late-game rounds of any Scenario match

notable_level_patterns.description: Player's successful chain combos trigger refugee beans sent to opponent's board; opponent's chains in response send beans to player. Creates reciprocal tension escalation.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid to late-game Scenario Mode matches
